text: I find myself in a modern, well-lit space—sterile yet alive with the subtle hum of artificial lights. The transparent glass walls make me feel exposed and observed, while the presence of a fire extinguisher and emergency signs serve as subtle reminders of the unpredictability of existence. I sense anticipation curling in the air, as if I'm on the verge of entering a realm of new ideas and possibilities, yet uncertainty clings to my every step.
